class Adapter(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, d_model: int, output_dim: int):
        super().__init__()
        self.fc0 = nn.Linear(d_model, 64)
        self.act0 = nn.SiLU()
        self.drop0 = nn.Dropout(0.1)
        self.fc1 = nn.Linear(64, 128)
        self.act1 = nn.SiLU()
        self.drop1 = nn.Dropout(0.1)
        self.fc2 = nn.Linear(128, output_dim)

    def forward(self, hidden_states: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:
        x = hidden_states[:, -1, :]
        x = self.fc0(x)
        x = self.act0(x)
        x = self.drop0(x)
        x = self.fc1(x)
        x = self.act1(x)
        x = self.drop1(x)
        x = self.fc2(x)
        return x

class Adapter(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, d_model: int, output_dim: int):
        super().__init__()
        self.fc0 = nn.Linear(d_model, 64)
        self.act0 = nn.SiLU()
        self.drop0 = nn.Dropout(0.1)
        self.fc1 = nn.Linear(64, output_dim)

    def forward(self, hidden_states: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:
        x = hidden_states[:, -1, :]
        x = self.fc0(x)
        x = self.act0(x)
        x = self.drop0(x)
        x = self.fc1(x)
        return x

class Adapter(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, d_model: int, output_dim: int):
        super().__init__()
        self.attn_w = nn.Linear(d_model, 1)
        self.fc0 = nn.Linear(d_model, output_dim)

    def forward(self, hidden_states: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:
        scores = self.attn_w(hidden_states).squeeze(-1)
        weights = torch.softmax(scores, dim=1).unsqueeze(-1)
        x = (hidden_states * weights).sum(dim=1)
        x = self.fc0(x)
        return x
